title: OwnershipSurface
description: Minimal forward stub for declared artifact ownership metadata. DGOS-T-0015 owns and will expand this subschema without changing the envelope $ref path.
$comment: Forward-compatibility stub for DGOS-T-0015. Keep the $id stable: artifact-envelope.schema.json references this file directly.

owns_files.description: REQUIRED array. Repo-relative file paths or glob patterns this artifact declares ownership over.

owns_interfaces.description: REQUIRED array. Interface names, routes, commands, or API contracts this artifact declares ownership over.

owns_data.description: REQUIRED array. Data stores, config keys, or logical data resources this artifact declares ownership over.

owns_workflow_steps.description: REQUIRED array. Workflow steps this artifact declares ownership over.

depends_on.description: OPTIONAL array. Ownership surfaces this artifact depends on but does not own.
